items.statusDetails:
WebDriverException: Message: Timed out after 10039ms waiting for the root AccessibilityNodeInfo in the active window. Make sure the active window is not constantly hogging the main UI thread (e.g. the application is being idle long enough), so the accessibility manager could do its work. Try changing the 'enforceXPath1' driver setting to 'true' in order to workaround the problem.
